technical.body: (announced 2026-04-20: $5B immediate + $20B milestone-tied). Anthropic commits over — $100B to AWS over 10 years — and locks in — 5 GW of Trainium2/3 capacity**. Project Rainier alone is roughly 500K Trainium2 chips.******

takes the top score across SWE-bench Pro / SkillsBench / SciCode and three other major coding benchmarks. — 260K context + preserve_thinking — , OpenAI / Anthropic-compatible APIs. Open weights are not released, which is drawing community pushback. — ****

citations.label: Decrypt - Alibaba Drops Qwen 3.6 Max Preview

technical.body: widens around April 20. — A malicious GGUF model embeds a Jinja2 SSTI payload in `tokenizer.chat_template`, then RCE fires through `/v1/rerank`. — The fix is migration to `ImmutableSandboxedEnvironment`. — ****

technical.body: : Anthropic's published Claude system prompts have been — converted into a git timeline — for history exploration. The Opus 4.6→4.7 diff drops the "President Trump" annotation and — updates Knowledge Cutoff to 2026-01**, renames `developer platform` to `Claude Platform`, and more.******
